params.name: Creation of Adam
params.source:
Lottery Machine (0.09%), Wishing (0.08%), Grandmaster Scrolls (0.77%)
Lottery Event (11/3-11/9)
params.description:
On Mar 18, 1512 AD, Michelangelo finished the last stroke of the Creation of Adam in the Sistine Chapel.
The Creation of Adam is the fourth painting on the Sistine Chapel, depicting the scene when God created Adam. On the left, Adam is lying on a hillside, stretching out his left arm. His finger almost touches the finger of God on the right. Eve, not yet created, peeks under God's left arm, and looks towards Adam on Earth.
[Basic Info]
Type: Fresco. Specification: 280 cmX570 cm.
